name: id
description: WoS record UID of the focal paper

name: ref_ctr
description: Join key to wos_references.ref_ctr (identifies the specific reference occurrence)

name: ref_ctrphs
description: Physical-section counter (increments per physicalSection child under each reference)

name: physicalLocation
description: Physical location identifier of the in-text citation within the document

name: section
description: Section of the paper where the reference appears (e.g. Introduction, Methods, Results)

name: function
description: Functional role of the citation in that section (e.g. background, compare, use)
